name: Trilogiq S.A.
summary: Trilogiq S.A. designs and manufactures modular systems for automotive, electronics, and aerospace sectors in France and internationally. It offers cantilevers, workstations, flowracks, trolleys, displays, personal work places, hotel equipment, dessert, trolleys, retail products, tables, shelves, handles, furnishing, shelves, cabinets, side tables, desks, components, connectors, tubes, rails, and accessories. Trilogiq S.A. was founded in 1992 and is based in Cergy Pontoise, France.
